title: Spicy Slovakian Black Pudding Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry dish from Thailand, featuring Slovakian black pudding as the main ingredient. This dish is quick and easy to make, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced hot pepper and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the Slovakian black pudding and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned.
Add the grated ginger and cooked rice to the wok. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
